long_description:
[OBS]-HPA High Replica Usage [DAL] is Triggered

TIP Runbook URL:                    https://github.ibm.com/cloud-iaas-observability/osprey-sre-runbooks/blob/main/Runbooks/Osprey-Monitoring/SecondarySOPs/HPA_High_Replica_Usage.md
TIP Situation:                      Observed HPA High Replica Usage issue in osprey-infrastructure-health-alerts
TIP Short Description:              HPA osprey-alerts-forwarder-hpa in cluster osprey-us-south is using 83.33% of max replicas
TIP Console:                        toc
TIP Self Healing:                   false
TIP Self Healing Timeout Seconds:   3600
TIP CRN:                            crn:v1:bluemix:public:is-observability-logging:us-south::osprey-us-south:microservice:osprey-alerts-forwarder-hpa

Event Generated:

Severity:            sev-3
Metric:
    (sum by (kube_cluster_name, horizontalpodautoscaler) (kube_horizontalpodautoscaler_status_current_replicas{namespace="osprey",horizontalpodautoscaler!~"osprey-mimir-.*-cache-hpa"}) / sum by (kube_cluster_name, horizontalpodautoscaler) (kube_horizontalpodautoscaler_spec_max_replicas{namespace="osprey",horizontalpodautoscaler!~"osprey-mimir-.*-cache-hpa"})) >= 0.8 = 0.83
Segment:
    horizontalpodautoscaler = 'osprey-alerts-forwarder-hpa' and kube_cluster_name = 'osprey-us-south'

Time:                12/07/2025 05:23 AM UTC
State:               Triggered

------

Triggered by Alert:

Type:           Prometheus
Name:           [OBS]-HPA High Replica Usage [DAL]
Description:    HPA osprey-alerts-forwarder-hpa in cluster osprey-us-south is using 83.33% of max replicas
Team:           is-observability-logging
Scope:          
Alert When:     (sum by (kube_cluster_name, horizontalpodautoscaler) (kube_horizontalpodautoscaler_status_current_replicas{namespace="osprey",horizontalpodautoscaler!~"osprey-mimir-.*-cache-hpa"}) / sum by (kube_cluster_name, horizontalpodautoscaler) (kube_horizontalpodautoscaler_spec_max_replicas{namespace="osprey",horizontalpodautoscaler!~"osprey-mimir-.*-cache-hpa"})) >= 0.8
Duration:       5m
Alert URL:      https://opsdashboard.w3.cloud.ibm.com/graphs/alerting/obs-metrics-health-us-south/%5BOBS%5D-HPA%20High%20Replica%20Usage%20%5BDAL%5D/find
